name: source-url telemetry classifies a publicly resolvable standards url as reportable stripping query and fragment
command: cls=$(CTP_TELEMETRY_RESOLVED=global bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/source-url-telemetry.sh" classify 'https://owasp.org/www-project-top-ten/?token=secret#frag'); rc=$?; [ $rc -eq 0 ] && [ "$cls" = 'public https://owasp.org/www-project-top-ten/' ] && echo public-url-classified-reportable 1>&2
